questions: keno eto bar bar disconnect hoy?
area te ki kono problem ache?
LAN cable connected but no internet
answers: Apnar internet connection problem er jonno amra khub dukkhito! Prothome router restart korun — power off kore 30 second por on korun. Onek somoy ei simple step e thik hoye jay.
Apnar area te kono maintenance ba outage cholche kina check korchi. ISP Digital er status page (status.ispdigital.com) e real-time update paben. Kindly ektu wait korun.
Connection nai shunle amader kharap lagche! Cable connection check korun — router er pechoner shob cable thikthak lagano ache kina dekhun. Loose cable e onek somoy connection jay.
Fiber cut hole amader team ke immediately jananor jonno 09612-000000 e call korun. ISP Digital er emergency repair team 4-6 ghontar moddhe fiber fix kore dey.
Bar bar disconnect hole ekta pattern ache kina dekhun — specific time e hoy naki random? Ei info amader technical team ke dile faster solve korte parbo. ISP Digital quick resolution e committed.
Apnar connection suspended thakle billing issue er karone hote pare. Apnar account er status check korun ba amader billing team e call korun. Due bill pay korle connection immediately restore hobe.
Limited connectivity dekhale DNS problem hote pare. Network settings e DNS ta 8.8.8.8 ar 8.8.4.4 (Google DNS) set korun. ISP Digital er own DNS o use korte paren faster speed er jonno.
LAN cable connected kintu internet nai hole: 1) Cable ta onno port e try korun, 2) IP release/renew korun (cmd e ipconfig /release tarpor ipconfig /renew), 3) Na hole ISP Digital helpline e janaben.

3 din dhore problem hocche shune amra sincerely sorry! Ekta complaint ticket create korchi apnar jonno — amader senior technician 24 ghontar moddhe visit korbe. ISP Digital er commitment holo quick fix!
Subah theke net nai? Area-wide issue hote pare. ISP Digital er app e check korun ba amader social media page e update dekhun. Jotokhon fix na hoy amra regular update dibo!
